title: Richard Shapiro
compiled_truth: Richard Shapiro is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-05), Richard Shapiro sent 520 and received 7206 emails, totalling 7726 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (123), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (123), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (59), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (58), [Ginger Dernehl](people/ginger-dernehl) (58). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, aadepartment, annex_5, budget, california___excess_profits_tax, california_campaign.
